case_title: MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. ROSENIA DUBOSE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SERVED OCT-22-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUBOSE, ROSENIA
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL LEASE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUBOSE, ROSENIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 22 SOUTH PARK ST. RM. 314 S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DUBOSE, ROSENIA DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DUBOSE, ROSENIA
WRIT FULLY SATISFIED AS TO THE POSSESSIONS
